---
name: Feature proposal
about: Propose a user-facing or contributor-facing improvement
title: "[Proposal]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user or contributor problem does this solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the smallest useful version.

## Evidence

What observation, workflow friction, issue, or test supports this?

## Non-goals

What should this proposal not include?

## Validation

How should we know the change worked?
